description: Per-node Ollama metrics, node CPU/memory, and Ollama service logs

panels.description: Number of models currently loaded in memory
panels.title: Models Loaded

panels.description: Total prompt tokens sent since last restart
panels.title: Prompt Tokens (total)

panels.description: Total tokens generated since last restart
panels.title: Generated Tokens (total)

panels.description: Tokens generated per second right now
panels.title: Token Generation Rate

panels.description: RAM used per loaded model. Shows which models are currently in memory.
panels.title: Models Loaded (RAM usage)

panels.description: Token generation rate per model over time
panels.title: Token Generation Rate (by model)

panels.description: P95 time per generated token per model
panels.title: Time per Token p95

panels.description: Distribution of generated tokens across models
panels.title: Generated Tokens by Model

panels.description: Distribution of prompt tokens across models
panels.title: Prompt Tokens by Model

targets.expr: (((count by (instance) (count(node_cpu_seconds_total{job=~"integrations/(node_exporter|unix)", instance=~"$instance"}) by (cpu, instance))) - sum by (instance) (sum by (instance, mode)(irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode=~"idle|iowait|steal", job=~"integrations/(node_exporter|unix)", instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval])))) * 100) / count by(instance) (count(node_cpu_seconds_total{job=~"integrations/(node_exporter|unix)", instance=~"$instance"}) by (cpu, instance))

panels.description: CPU usage per core over time
panels.title: CPU Usage over Time

panels.description: 1m, 5m, 15m load averages with core count reference
panels.title: Load Average

panels.description: Memory breakdown: used, cached, buffers, free over time
panels.title: Memory Usage over Time

panels.description: Percentage of log entries by detected level (info, warn, error) for the Ollama service
panels.title: Log Level Distribution

panels.description: Log entry rate over time for the Ollama service, by log level
panels.title: Log Volume over Time

panels.description: Raw Ollama service log lines from journald
panels.title: Ollama Logs

title: Ollama / Summary by Node
